title: REUS MOBILITAT I SERVEIS ransomware incident

extortion.description: REUS MOBILITAT I SERVEIS (AMERSHAM) is the municipal company that manages the public car parks and the blue zone of the city of Reus. The management is carried out from a single Control Center through a complete Centralization system. Each of the managed centers has automatisms that allow it to operate without staff most of the time. reusmobilitat.cat
